purpose: Provides current project handoff state, next actions, blockers, risks, and stop conditions for the next coding agent.
critical_context: Vouch is a commitment-backed payment coordination system for appointments and in-person agreements.
Both parties must confirm presence within the confirmation window for funds to release.
If both confirmations do not occur, funds must refund, void, or remain uncaptured according to provider flow.
Vouch must not become a marketplace, scheduler, broker, social app, review system, messaging system, escrow provider, or dispute-resolution platform.
Admins inspect operational state only and must not decide who is right.
Payment state must be provider-backed through Stripe Connect or equivalent infrastructure.

next_actions.title: Add generated .agents files to repo
next_actions.details: Create the full .agents directory structure and commit the generated docs, contracts, instructions, and execution seed files.

next_actions.title: Validate JSON and YAML syntax
next_actions.details: Run a parser/validator for all JSON and YAML files before code implementation.

next_actions.title: Implement Prisma schema
next_actions.details: Map domain-model.yaml to Prisma models, enums, relations, uniqueness constraints, and indexes.

next_actions.title: Implement auth and authz foundation
next_actions.details: Implement Clerk sync, user helpers, setup gates, participant-scoped authz, admin authz, and denial-by-default behavior.

next_actions.title: Implement Vouch lifecycle
next_actions.details: Build create, invite, accept, decline, confirm, complete, expire, refund, and failed-state flows.

next_actions.title: Resolve Stripe Connect architecture
next_actions.details: Select exact payment flow for no-custody commitment, release, refund/void/non-capture, and platform fee behavior before production payment implementation.

next_actions.title: Implement UI surfaces
next_actions.details: Build public pages, dashboard, Vouch detail, setup, settings, and admin operational views using the shared component instructions.

next_actions.title: Implement tests and validation gates
next_actions.details: Add Vitest and Playwright coverage aligned to acceptance-gates.yaml.

known_blockers.title: Exact Stripe Connect payment flow not selected
known_blockers.impact: Blocks production-grade payment implementation and no-custody validation.

known_blockers.title: Legal/compliance review not completed
known_blockers.impact: Blocks production launch and approved payment/escrow-adjacent language.

known_blockers.title: Implementation not started
known_blockers.impact: All validation gates remain not_run until repo code exists.

risks.title: Marketplace drift
risks.description: Adding profiles, listings, search, categories, messages, reviews, or recommendations would violate Vouch constraints.
risks.mitigation: Run no_marketplace_surface gate after route/component/entity changes.

risks.title: Arbitration drift
risks.description: Adding disputes, claims, evidence, admin awards, or confirmation rewrites would violate deterministic resolution.
risks.mitigation: Run no_arbitration_surface gate after admin or payment changes.

risks.title: Payment custody ambiguity
risks.description: Incorrect Stripe architecture could make Vouch appear to custody funds or operate as escrow.
risks.mitigation: Complete payment_flow_review before production payment launch.

risks.title: Client-side authority leakage
risks.description: Letting client components decide authz, confirmation eligibility, payment status, or lifecycle state would violate server-authoritative requirements.
risks.mitigation: Keep protected logic in fetchers/actions and test authz boundaries.

risks.title: Inadequate audit trail
risks.description: Missing audit events would reduce traceability for payment and lifecycle actions.
risks.mitigation: Enforce audit_events gate for every domain mutation.

stop_conditions: Requested work creates arbitration or dispute-resolution behavior.
Requested work requires direct custody of funds.
Requested payment implementation depends on unresolved Stripe/legal decision.
Migration may destroy data without explicit approval.
Validation failure cannot be safely resolved in scope.
handoff_note: The next agent should implement from contracts first, not from freeform interpretation. Treat all current validation as not_run until commands and tests are executed in the repo.
